Welcome to mindscape

🚀 A fullstack web application built with egg_cli

🔧 Powered by Go, PostgreSQL, and modern web technologies

💻 You can edit your code in the ./mindscape directory

🌟 Give the generator a star on GitHub

🔐 Authentication

Secure user login and registration check that out in the
./mindscape/services/AuthService.go directory

📊 Database

PostgreSQL with SQLC integration. Be sure to check out the
./mindscape/db/queries directory

🐳 Docker Ready

Containerized deployment with Docker.

📝 API Docs

Swagger documentation available

Check out the Swagger Docs

👀 GitHub Actions

Continuous integration and deployment with GitHub Actions.

🚀 Deployment

Deploy to any environment with ease.

I made this with Coolify in mind 😊

Configuration is easy

in the ./mindscape/config/ directory you can find the configuration file and set up environment variables

then you can specify your envirenment with
mindscape -e a_bad_ass_env

🌟 Star Us

Give the generator a star on GitHub

Server started:

Environment: Development
